title: Elon Musk claims Grok will make 'historically accurate' AI 'Odyssey' adaptation this year
excerpt: Christopher Nolan lives rent-free in an ex-trillionaire's head.
content_html:
In news that assures us that we are truly living in one of the worst timelines, Elon Musk has announced on X, the social media platform he owns, that Grok Imagine, the AI generator he owns, will make a "historically accurate" adaptation of Homer's The Odyssey.

You might well ask why if you have had the good fortune to be oblivious to Musk's repeated complaints about Christopher Nolan's The Odyssey. Well, in February of 2026, Musk used X to declare "Chris Nolan has lost his integrity," because Musk didn't like the casting of Lupita Nyong’o as Helen of Troy.

Then, in May, Musk retweeted X posts that criticized the casting of Elliot Page, including posts that misgender the trans actor. Musk also tweeted that month, "Chris Nolan is pissing on Homer’s grave. Disgraceful."

You May Also Like

Musk has used the platform he owns to promote the idea that Nolan was casting not for "historical accuracy" of the fictional epic poem, but to appease the Oscars' inclusion standards. Musk was also a vocal part of the "go woke, go broke" online contingent that insisted Nolan's Odyssey would sink at the box office.

To put it simply, they were wrong.

Mashable Top Stories

Critics and audiences alike have heralded The Odyssey as a "masterpiece," cheering both the ensemble cast and the political messaging within the film. The nearly three-hour movie had a $124.5 million opening weekend, which is all the more impressive for a rated-R film. By contrast, Nolan's The Dark Knight Rises, a PG-13 movie with two prequels to build an audience, opened to $160 million in 2012.

On top of that, the demand to see The Odyssey in 70mm IMAX has become a status symbol to moviegoers, with tickets to screenings sold out into August — even for 3 a.m. showtimes. Audiences in person and online have also dove into discussing Nolan's unique adaptation, which plays as a spiritual sequel to Oppenheimer, and employs Matt Damon as its secret weapon.

However, Musk thinks he and Grok can do better. Today, he tweeted: "Before this year ends, Grok Imagine will make a full-length movie of The Odyssey that is historically accurate and true to the art of Homer."

This Tweet is currently unavailable. It might be loading or has been removed.

The trailer he retweeted to illustrate what such a movie made by Grok Imagine might look like certainly is a trailer made by AI.

Earlier this month, Nolan shared his thoughts on generative AI with AFP in Paris. The Guardian quotes him as saying, "But I think the idea that it replaces human beings wholesale and human creativity, to me it’s a nonsense," adding, "I’ve never seen a technology that’s been so successfully adopted by Wall Street and by investors and by tech companies that the public has so thoroughly rejected."

Christopher Nolan's The Odyssey is now in theaters. Elon Musk's The Odyssey is promised by the end of the year.

content_html_zh:
埃隆·马斯克（Elon Musk）在他拥有的社交媒体平台 X 上宣布，他拥有的人工智能生成器 Grok Imagine 将对荷马的《奥德赛》进行“历史准确”的改编，这一消息让我们确信我们确实生活在最糟糕的时间线之一。

如果你有幸没有注意到马斯克对克里斯托弗·诺兰的《奥德赛》一再的抱怨，你可能会问为什么。 好吧，2026 年 2 月，马斯克用 X 宣称“克里斯·诺兰已经失去了正直”，因为马斯克不喜欢露皮塔·尼永奥饰演特洛伊的海伦。

然后，在 5 月，马斯克转发了 X 条批评艾略特·佩奇选角的帖子，其中包括歪曲跨性别演员性别的帖子。 马斯克当月还在推特上写道：“克里斯·诺兰在荷马的坟墓上撒尿。 可耻。”

你可能也喜欢

马斯克利用他拥有的平台来宣传诺兰选角不是为了虚构史诗的“历史准确性”，而是为了满足奥斯卡的入选标准。 马斯克也是“醒来吧，破产吧”网络队伍的直言不讳的一员，他们坚称诺兰的《奥德赛》票房将会下滑。

简而言之，他们错了。

可混搭的热门故事

评论家和观众都称赞《奥德赛》是一部“杰作”，为影片中的演员阵容和政治信息欢呼雀跃。 这部时长近三个小时的电影首周末票房收入达 1.245 亿美元，这对于一部 R 级电影来说更令人印象深刻。 相比之下，诺兰的《黑暗骑士崛起》是一部 PG-13 级别的电影，通过两部前传吸引了观众，2012 年首映票房为 1.6 亿美元。

最重要的是，观看 70 毫米 IMAX 电影《奥德赛》的需求已成为电影观众的身份象征，观影门票一直到 8 月都已售空，甚至凌晨 3 点也售罄。 放映时间。 现场和网上的观众也纷纷讨论诺兰独特的改编作品，该片是奥本海默的精神续集，并采用马特·达蒙作为其秘密武器。

然而，马斯克认为他和 Grok 可以做得更好。 今天，他在推特上写道：“在今年结束之前，Grok Imagine 将制作一部完整的《奥德赛》电影，该电影在历史上是准确的，并且忠于荷马的艺术。”

此推文当前不可用。 它可能正在加载或已被删除。

他转发的预告片展示了 Grok Imagine 制作的这样一部电影的样子，这肯定是人工智能制作的预告片。

本月早些时候，诺兰在巴黎与法新社分享了他对生成人工智能的看法。 《卫报》援引他的话说，“但我认为，它取代了人类整体和人类创造力的想法，对我来说是无稽之谈，”他补充道，“我从未见过一种技术如此成功地被华尔街、投资者和科技公司采用，而公众却如此彻底拒绝。”

克里斯托弗·诺兰的《奥德赛》现已上映。 埃隆·马斯克的《奥德赛》有望在今年年底上映。
